neverPauses.description:
True when a `minCapacity: 0` instance has not reached 0 ACU over the observation
window — it is silently paying always-on prices (auto-pause verification).

resourceId.description:
Alien resource id, such as the `alien.Container` or `alien.Storage`
resource id from the stack.

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier that determines the specific kind of resource. This field is used for polymorphic deserialization and resource-specific behavior.
